SavedAgendaItem.title: SavedAgendaItem
SavedAgendaItem.description: A saved meeting agenda session with associated metadata and files.

id.description: Unique identifier of the saved agenda session.

templateId.description: The ID of the template used to generate this agenda.

agenda.description: The detailed agenda content including stakeholders and agenda items.

files.description: List of associated files uploaded for generation.

completedItemIds.description: List of item IDs within this agenda that are completed.

/agendas/{agendaId}.description: Collection of saved agendas belonging to users.
